name: etf-intelligent-education-platform
description: ETF 智能投教平台第一阶段 Demo

scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,cyan "pnpm --filter api dev" "pnpm --filter web dev"
scripts.build: pnpm --filter api build && pnpm --filter web build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter api typecheck && pnpm --filter web typecheck
